## Editing.IEditableCollection interface

Editable collection wrapper. Wraps a ValidatingResultMap with metadata and export functionality for entity editing workflows.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IEditableCollection<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> extends ValidatingResultMap<TBaseId, T> 
```
**Extends:** ValidatingResultMap&lt;TBaseId, T&gt;
